Notes: UWO ranked 17th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO also defeated UWP,
76-49, on Dec. 4...UWO's Kuehl has third double-double of season, totaling 13
points and 14 rebounds...UWP gets 25 points and seven rebounds from Clark...
UWO led the final 22:48 of play...UWO ended game with 20-9 scoring run.
Game.Officials: Taylor DeValk,  John Furrer,  Nicholas White
